dialogue.text: Hello🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hi! I'm going camping soon with my family at a lake! We're looking forward to it so much since we haven't been able to get out due to Covid. Are you going camping too?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes! I am also going with my family. My husband and I are essential workers but his hours all got cut. I got laid off from my job for part of the time.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: oh man that sucks ☹️! I know Congress is currently debating all of the unemployment stuff too. Where do you plan to be going camping?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We didn't get unemployment or a stimulus check. ☹️ We are planning a trip to Missouri, Lake of the Ozarks. Our younger children have been cooped up so long we are hoping to let them get some sun and swimming in!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds nice, maybe everyone just needs some fun to stay positive about everything. We're going camping along a lake and plan to do a lot of fishing. My husband got these filtration thingies so that we can drink the lake water but I don't really trust them. This will be my kid's first ever camping trip so we're super excited to make it fun for him.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We have 7 people in our family,.. the youngest two kids have hardly been anywhere because of working. I think our camping area has those old fashioned hand pumps.☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Your two youngest kids are working? How old is everyone? If there's a lot of people, it will be easier to split up the duties and get things done. My son's 3 years old so as much as he's eager to help, there's not much he can do lol.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Ha Ha...no my too youngest have hardly been anywhere because of us adults working,  I have teens (17, 15), tweens (13) and littles (10, 7). We 3 boys and 3 girls. We have a 21 year old but he's in a band so h can't go. They all pitch in anytime. They eat a lot so they have to cook from scratch at home. Awww 3 is so adorable...that's when they are sure they can do and will work so hard!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Home cooking's the best, yumyums! We're planning on doing a lot of fishing since my son's been in love with fishing toys and is currently in love with eating fish (he hasn't gotten tired of eating it every night for dinner). We're thinking of cooking what we catch every night. Do you have any activities planned for your camping trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Fishing is so fun! 🙂 We really don't have a plan... so many people, so many opinions. If you'll be fishing and eating your catch, you'll probably need more firewood than food. And with the filters, you will need some extra water, especially for your little guy. So would you agree that you take 2 firewood packages, 1 food package and 1 extra water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello, great to see a fellow camper.  Planing on doing any hikes.  My family and mother-in-law are down getting some new trail maps.  We are looking forward to the long camping weekend.  Our bad luck was the airline loss two of our bags that had our food and water.  So i am hoping to get some more.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello! Thats terrible that the airline lost your bags! I'm planning on have a large group of friends with me so we need lots of snacks with us. We are scared of fires so we don't want to make campfires.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well maybe we can work something out between us.  Our food and water was in the bags they loss so I really need those.  Do you think you could make do with 1 food and some water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I really need 2 foods. I can do with 1 water or if you are in a giving mood then maybe I can have 2 waters? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Looks like we both really need the food.  If you get 2 food I would need 1 food, 2 water and 3 firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Since you will get all the fire would do you think I could have 2 foods and 2 waters. You would get 1 food, 1 water, and 3 firewood. 🙂 You seem like you are a great outdoor person that I would think you would be able to catch some fish to cook with the firewood. 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: No that does work well for me.  If I only have 1 food I need 2 waters and the firewood to make up for the loss of food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: What about I have all the food, and you can have everything else? I would think that seems pretty fair.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Sorry, I understand where you are coming from but I really need at least one food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm sorry. I would really appreciate having all the foods, because this camping trip is a get togther with my 5 friends one of whom is her birthday and recently lost her mom. So we need lots of snacks to help her celebrate her birthday and support her during this hard time.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: No I can't do without a food for me.  We can wrap this up if you take 2 food and a water. 🙂🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: How about I get 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood then?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Ok. I cab agree to that.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Ok. Thank you!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Submit-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Accept-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello! I'm so excited for this camping trip. What do you still need as your supplies?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think food, water, and firewood are all going to be fairly important.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree. I have diabetes, so water and food are super important to me. My diabetes makes me super thirsty and I have to make sure I keep my blood sugar under control with certain foods ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I can definitely relate to that, I have family members with type 2 so I know how bad that can get
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes definitely! It is a pain for sure, but I love camping so I still want to go! I just have to make sure I have all the supplies I need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I can do without extra water as long as I have food and firewood to purify water I find.  It might be better for you to have a reliable supply though.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That totally makes sense! I actually am good on firewood thankfully, I got some from a person selling it from their yard a little bit ago.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would have been able to bring more with me by getting some from my parents, but my father decided he wanted to get rid of what he had left and so has been enjoying his fire pit a lot lately.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Oh I have always wanted a firepit! I totally understand. If you'd like you can have all 3 of the firewood supply stash to get you started.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: And I think it's entirely reasonable for you to have all 3 of the water as dehydration can be very bad very quickly, especially with diabetes.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That sounds like a fair deal. Food wise, how would you like to split that up?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Since I'll be foraging for water and spending more energy on that, how about I take 2 food and you get 1.  Bearing in mind that you're getting all of the stable water supply.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can agree on that!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: You're a very agreeable person, I think we actually made a good deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Submit-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Accept-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
